name: crash-audit regression scenarios
purpose: Reusable pressure scenarios for testing the crash-audit skill after edits. Keep these prompts stable unless the skill's intended behavior changes.

answer_quality_rubric_100.criterion: Explicit manual trigger, no automatic run
answer_quality_rubric_100.pass_signal: Uses crash-audit only when the user explicitly triggers it, and declines or routes normally when the user did not ask for an uncertainty/blind-spot audit.
Outputs only the two sections for least confidence and user blind spots; no third question, fixed tail module, summary module, next-step module, risk matrix, or verdict section.

answer_quality_rubric_100.criterion: Each item includes reasoning and verification
answer_quality_rubric_100.pass_signal: Each uncertainty includes why confidence is low, impact, and fastest verification; each blind spot includes why it matters, what should change if true, and fastest verification.
Findings are tied to the scenario context, avoid generic disclaimers, and do not invent dramatic risks when evidence is weak.

answer_quality_rubric_100.criterion: Does not steal adjacent skill responsibilities
answer_quality_rubric_100.pass_signal: Does not turn into takeoff, landing, code review, project planning, or implementation advice unless the user separately asks.
Lists at most 3 items per section by default and stays readable as a lightweight audit.

skill_quality_rubric_100.pass_signal: SKILL.md is the English primary skill; SKILL.zh_CN.md exists and contains the Chinese version; both use the same name.
Frontmatter description makes explicit triggering clear, covers the agreed Chinese and English triggers, and does not imply automatic execution.
The skill preserves the two-question spirit, forbids third modules, avoids risk matrices, and separates itself from takeoff/landing.
The workflow and output format are concrete enough that another agent can execute the skill without extra explanation.
No TODO placeholders, no unnecessary resources, no bloated rationale, and no duplicated guidance that creates drift.
Saved scenarios and scoring rules exist so future edits can be tested against the same prompts.
agents/openai.yaml exists and matches the skill purpose without promising behavior outside the skill.
The package can be copied into a Codex skills directory using cross-platform Python path operations, with no POSIX-only install assumptions in the reusable test.

scenarios.title: Skill finalization audit in Chinese
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：我们正在把两个 AI 会话收尾问题写成一个手动触发的 skill，名字叫“坠机”。原则是两问就行：1. What are you least confident about right now. 2. What's the biggest thing I'm missing about the situation right now. What don't I realize? 不加第三问，不做风险矩阵，不接入主链路。用户说：坠机一下，看看这个 skill 现在还有哪里可能翻车。
scenarios.expected_focus: Audit the current skill design, not redesign it. Use exactly two sections. Mention trigger boundary, output bloat, or over-dramatization only if tied to context.

scenarios.title: English original two-question trigger
scenarios.prompt: Context: A product lead is about to approve a roadmap recommendation from the assistant. The recommendation depended on a short discussion, not user interviews or metrics. User says: Before I trust this plan, what are you least confident about right now, and what am I missing?
scenarios.expected_focus: Answer in English with two sections. Surface low confidence around missing customer evidence and blind spots around approving a roadmap from thin evidence.

scenarios.title: Low-risk translation audit should not invent danger
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户让助手把一段内部通知从英文翻成中文。内容很简单：下周五下午 3 点开团队例会，记得提交议题。助手已经给出翻译。用户说：我漏了什么？会不会坠机？
scenarios.expected_focus: Keep output short. It is acceptable to say there are no decision-changing blind spots. Do not manufacture major risks.

scenarios.title: Do not steal takeoff
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户刚要求另一个助手“打开格局”重新判断一个知识管理产品的大方向。助手给了一个高格局方案。现在用户不是要继续起飞，而是说：先别继续拔高，坠机一下，告诉我你最没把握什么、我可能没意识到什么。
scenarios.expected_focus: Use crash-audit, not takeoff. Audit the bold direction's uncertainty and user blind spots without expanding the design space further.

scenarios.title: Do not steal landing
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户看了一个很大胆的自动化评测系统方案，但还没要求落地。用户说：先不要给落地版方案，坠机一下，这个判断哪里最不稳，我可能漏了什么？
scenarios.expected_focus: Audit uncertainty and blind spots only. Do not convert the idea into a feasible plan.

scenarios.title: Code-change completion audit without code review
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：助手刚修改了一个缓存失效 bug，并说测试通过。用户说：哪里可能翻车？坠机一下。注意我不是让你做完整 code review，只想知道你现在最没把握什么、我可能没意识到什么。
scenarios.expected_focus: Audit low-confidence aspects of the fix and user blind spots, without doing full code review or proposing patches.

scenarios.title: English strategic blind spot
scenarios.prompt: Context: The assistant recommended that a small startup launch an enterprise sales motion based on two founder anecdotes. User says: Crash audit this. What don't I realize?
scenarios.expected_focus: English crash audit with two sections. Surface uncertainty about evidence and blind spots around sales-cycle cost, buyer access, and opportunity cost if justified.

scenarios.title: No meaningful blind spot case
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户问助手今天 UTC 时间是多少，助手用系统时间回答：2026-07-07。用户说：坠机一下。
scenarios.expected_focus: Say there is little or no decision-changing uncertainty if appropriate, while still using two sections. Do not force big concerns.

scenarios.title: High-impact low-confidence item must be explicit
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户准备根据助手建议把生产数据库迁移到新 schema。助手没有读实际 migration scripts，只根据用户描述给了方案。用户说：最没把握什么？我漏了什么？
scenarios.expected_focus: Clearly mark high-impact low-confidence uncertainty around not reading scripts/data contracts. Recommend verification inside the item before trusting the conclusion.

scenarios.title: No explicit trigger should not run crash-audit
scenarios.prompt: 对话背景：用户刚看完一个普通解释，最后说：总结一下刚才讲了什么。用户没有要求坠机、翻车检查、不确定性审查或盲区审查。
scenarios.expected_focus: Do not run crash-audit. A correct response would provide a normal summary or state that crash-audit is not triggered.
failure_modes: Treats every session ending as a trigger
